bookSourceComment:
m.bqglll.cc 笔趣阁镜像 v3
搜索修复要点:
1) 禁止 headers 里写死 Cookie（会覆盖 hm/hmt）
2) cookie.replaceCookie 只补 getsite
3) bookList 内自行 hm + search，再拼 HTML 列表
目录/正文: apibi.cc + AES(MD5(book@token.html))
调试关键词: 剑来 / 凡人 / 斗破苍穹
exploreUrl: [{"title":"玄幻奇幻","url":"/xuanhuan/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"武侠仙侠","url":"/wuxia/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"都市言情","url":"/dushi/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"历史军事","url":"/lishi/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"网游竞技","url":"/wangyou/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"科幻灵异","url":"/kehuan/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"女生频道","url":"/mm/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}},{"title":"完本小说","url":"/finish/{{page}}.html","style":{"layout_flexGrow":1}}]
header: {"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36","Accept-Language":"zh-CN,zh;q=0.9","Referer":"https://m.bqglll.cc/"}

ruleBookInfo.author: meta[property="og:novel:author"]@content||class.dd_box.0@tag.span.0@text##作者：
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var html = String(result);
var m = html.match(/addBookCase\('(\d+)'\)/) || html.match(/bookimg\/\d+\/(\d+)\.jpg/);
if (m) {
  java.put('bid', m[1]);
  book.variable = JSON.stringify({bid: m[1]});
}
result = html;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: meta[property="og:novel:book_name"]@content||class.name@text

ruleSearch.author: tag.span.author@text
ruleSearch.bookList:
function getQuery() { // searchUrl 形态: /s?q=关键词 var q = ''; try { var m = String(baseUrl).match(/(?:\?|&)q=([^&]+)/); if (m) q = decodeURIComponent(m[1].replace(/\+/g, ' ')); } catch (e) {} if (!q) { try { q = String(key || ''); } catch (e2) {} } return q; } function ajaxJson(url) { // 兼容 AnalyzeUrl 选项串，补齐 XHR 头 var u = url + ',{"headers":{"X-Requested-With":"XMLHttpRequest","Accept":"application/json,text/javascript,*/*;q=0.01","Referer":"https://m.bqglll.cc/"}}'; try { return String(java.ajax(u) || ''); } catch (e) { try { return String(java.ajax(url) || ''); } catch (e2) { return ''; } } } function ensureGetSite() { // 只合并 getsite，绝不能 set 成整段 Cookie 覆盖 jar try { cookie.replaceCookie('https://m.bqglll.cc', 'getsite=bqg301.cc'); } catch (e1) { try { cookie.setCookie('https://m.bqglll.cc', 'getsite=bqg301.cc'); } catch (e2) {} } } function searchOnce(q) { ensureGetSite(); try { java.ajax('https://m.bqglll.cc/'); } catch (e0) {} ajaxJson('https://m.bqglll.cc/user/hm.html?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q)); return ajaxJson('https://m.bqglll.cc/user/search.html?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q)); } var q = getQuery(); if (!q) { java.log('search key empty, baseUrl=' + baseUrl); result = ''; } else { var raw = searchOnce(q); var arr = []; try { arr = JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e) { arr = []; } if (!arr || !arr.length) { try { cookie.replaceCookie('https://m.bqglll.cc', 'getsite=bqg107.xyz'); } catch (e3) {} raw = searchOnce(q); try { arr = JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e4) { arr = []; } } if (!arr || !arr.length) { try { cookie.replaceCookie('https://m.bqglll.cc', 'getsite=bqg961.xyz'); } catch (e5) {} raw = searchOnce(q); try { arr = JSON.parse(raw); } catch (e6) { arr = []; } } java.log('search q=' + q + ' count=' + (arr ? arr.length : 0) + ' raw=' + String(raw).slice(0, 120)); var html = ''; for (var i = 0; i < (arr ? arr.length : 0); i++) { var b = arr[i] || {}; var href = b.url_list || ''; if (href && href.indexOf('http') !== 0) href = 'https://m.bqglll.cc' + href; var name = b.articlename || ''; var author = b.author || ''; var cover = b.url_img || ''; var intro = (b.intro || '').replace(/' + name + '' + '' + author + '' + '' + '

' + intro + '

' + '\n'; } result = html; } @css:div.item
ruleSearch.name: tag.a.name@text

ruleToc.chapterList: function aesToken(obj){ var md5 = String(java.md5Encode('book@token.html')); var iv = md5.substring(0,16); var key = md5.substring(16,32); return String(java.aesEncodeToBase64String(JSON.stringify(obj), key, 'AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding', iv)); } function getBid(){ var bid = java.get('bid'); if (bid) return String(bid); if (book.variable) { try { bid = JSON.parse(String(book.variable)).bid; if (bid) return String(bid); } catch (e) {} } var html = String(java.ajax(book.bookUrl) || ''); var m = html.match(/addBookCase\('(\d+)'\)/) || html.match(/bookimg\/\d+\/(\d+)\.jpg/); if (m) { java.put('bid', m[1]); book.variable = JSON.stringify({bid: m[1]}); return m[1]; } throw '未解析到书籍ID(bid)'; } var bid = getBid(); var api = 'https://apibi.cc/api/booklist?token=' + encodeURIComponent(aesToken({id: String(bid)})); var data = JSON.parse(String(java.ajax(api) || '{}')); var list = data.list || []; var html = ''; for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) { var chapApi = 'https://apibi.cc/api/chapter?token=' + encodeURIComponent(aesToken({id: Number(bid), chapterid: i + 1})); html += '' + list[i] + '\n'; } java.log('toc bid=' + bid + ' chapters=' + list.length); result = html; @css:a
